axexo-app.title: Axexo App
axexo-app.desc: Designed and architected the Axexo consumer app — a fintech platform featuring business verticals, an integrated stablecoin wallet, and crypto on-ramp/off-ramp flows (MXN ↔ USDT) bringing financial inclusion to underbanked segments across Latin America.

mbx-app.title: MBX — B2B Mobile App
mbx-app.desc: Architected and led development of MBX, Axexo's B2B mobile application for field sales agents — enabling real-time transaction processing, account management, and product distribution built in React Native for Android and iOS.

disney-globant.title: My Disney Experience — Test Automation
disney-globant.desc: Maintained the mobile test automation suite (Appium/Java) for My Disney Experience — Disney's flagship resort app — covering critical guest-facing booking and park navigation flows integrated directly into the client CI pipeline.

1000-historias.title: 1000 y Una Historias
1000-historias.desc: Designed and QA-tested an interactive Unity game shipped as a WebGL experience for nursing education — bridging game design and structured manual testing to deliver a production-ready learning tool.

1000-historias-ar.title: 1000 y Una Historias — AR
1000-historias-ar.desc: Extended the educational game with augmented reality using Unity AR Foundation, enabling immersive mobile storytelling layered over the physical environment.

titania-rv-admin.title: Titania VR Admin
titania-rv-admin.desc: Built the content management backoffice for a 360° Unity VR platform, allowing non-technical editors to update scene assets and configurations without touching source files.

instapay-portal.title: InstaPay Portal
instapay-portal.desc: Maintained and extended the InstaPay web portal — Emida's retail-facing distribution platform enabling point-of-sale agents to top up mobile credits, pay services, and manage transactions across telecom and utility providers.

1000-historias-backoffice.title: 1000 y Una Historias — Backoffice
1000-historias-backoffice.desc: Wireframed the administrative layer for the AR project's content pipeline, defining information architecture and interaction patterns for the content management interface.

ssl-colombia.title: SSL Colombia
ssl-colombia.desc: Designed UX and wireframes for the custom Moodle-based backoffice of an e-learning platform, covering information architecture through annotated Adobe XD prototypes.

edingenieriaeng.title: ED Ingeniería
edingenieriaeng.desc: Built a React + Node.js web application for calculating and dimensioning electrical structures, designed for field engineers with complex multi-variable input workflows.

titania-rv.title: Titania VR
titania-rv.desc: Developed a 360° VR application in Unity for ecosystem and environmental education, delivering immersive classroom experiences without requiring dedicated VR hardware.

gou.title: GoU — Carpooling
gou.desc: Designed and built a carpooling platform across web and Android, including real-time route matching, ride requests, and user authentication flows.
